business.name: InstantFix 24/7 Plumbing
business.tagline: Fast, Reliable Plumbing Any Time, Always

sample_reviews.author: Karen H
sample_reviews.text: Called at midnight with a burst pipe and the engineer arrived within the hour. Sorted the problem quickly and professionally. Absolute lifesaver!

sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: Great service from start to finish. Fair pricing even for a Sunday callout. Would highly recommend InstantFix to anyone in Birmingham.

sample_reviews.author: Priya M
sample_reviews.text: Very responsive and polite. Fixed our boiler the same day we called. Really pleased with how quickly they turned up and got things working again.

brand.usp: InstantFix 24/7 Plumbing delivers round-the-clock emergency plumbing across Birmingham, with fast response times and transparent pricing so you're never left in the dark.
brand.hero_headline: Birmingham's 24/7 Emergency Plumber, Always On Call
brand.about_paragraph: We're InstantFix 24/7 Plumbing, and we built this business around one simple idea — plumbing emergencies don't wait, so neither do we. Based in Birmingham, we're available every hour of every day to tackle everything from burst pipes to boiler breakdowns. When you call us, you get a qualified, friendly engineer on your doorstep fast, with no hidden charges and no fuss.
